---
name: cloud-build-enforcer
summary: "Generate or update a cloudbuild_enforcer.yaml manifest and enforce cloud build policies."
---

Use this prompt to create, validate, or update a Cloud Build policy manifest for enforcing approved cloud build behavior.

Examples:
- "Generate a cloudbuild_enforcer.yaml that requires all builds to run in Cloud Build."
- "Update the Cloud Build policy to forbid local Docker builds and require `cloudbuild.yaml`."
- "Create a force-cloud-build configuration and explain how to integrate it into CI."
